query:
SELECT a.id, a.name, a.code, a.attributeGroupId, ag.name as groupName
FROM attributes a
LEFT JOIN attribute_groups ag ON a.attributeGroupId = ag.id
WHERE ag.name LIKE '%件数%' OR ag.name LIKE '%包装%' OR ag.code LIKE '%pieces%' OR ag.code LIKE '%packaging%'
LIMIT 20;
